final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial documentary photography, golden ratio composition
Primary request: dawn prayer ceremony at Varanasi's Ganges River ghats, capturing the spiritual atmosphere of hundreds of Hindu devotees
Scene/backdrop: ancient stone ghats along the Ganges River at dawn, misty river surface with floating oil lamps, distant silhouette of the opposite riverbank
Subject: elderly priest in orange saffron robes at center, holding a copper oil lamp amid rising incense smoke; surrounding devotees bathing in river, praying with folded hands, floating flower offerings
Style/medium: 35mm film documentary photography, rich saturated colors, film grain texture
Composition/framing: golden ratio composition, foreground with blurred flower petals, midground focused on priest and devotees, background showing riverbank silhouette, wide establishing shot
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunrise light from horizon casting warm amber tones across the scene, soft diffused morning light with atmospheric haze, reverent and serene mood
Color palette: warm golden amber + burnt orange saffron robes + copper metallic tones + soft rose pink from flower offerings + muted blue-gray water reflections
Materials/textures: coarse woven saffron fabric, weathered copper oil lamp with patina, smooth river water with gentle ripples, delicate flower petals, rough ancient stone steps
Constraints: maintain the priest as central focal point, preserve the documentary authenticity of the ritual, keep the layered depth with foreground/midground/background separation
Avoid: oversaturated neon colors, plastic-looking textures, modern elements, staged poses, artificial lighting, oversharpening, watermark
